item.title: Pre-built VM snapshots for sub-60s provisioning
item.intent: Pre-built VM snapshots reduce provisioning time from 3 minutes to under 60 seconds. This is the technical foundation of the 60-second demo promise and a key competitive differentiator for sovereignty-first cloud deployment.
item.description: Snapshot builder in src/cloud/provisioning/snapshot.ts. Creates a golden VM image per provider: provisions base VM, installs Docker + clawhq, cleans up, snapshots. The snapshot is reused for all future provisions — only blueprint config and tokens are injected at boot time via metadata/user-data. Snapshot version tracked and auto-rebuilt when clawhq version changes.
steps: Build snapshot creation pipeline: provision → install → snapshot → destroy builder
Implement per-provider snapshot management (DO snapshots, AWS AMIs, GCP images)
Add boot-time config injection: blueprint + tokens via cloud metadata
Version tracking: rebuild snapshot when clawhq version changes
Add clawhq cloud snapshot build/list/delete commands
acceptanceCriteria: Snapshot-based provision produces running agent in under 60 seconds
Snapshot auto-rebuilt when clawhq version changes
Boot-time config injection works without re-running full install
Snapshot management commands available in CLI
